description: European band config — UZ801 V3.0 (WCDMA B1/B8, LTE B1/B3/B5/B7/B8/B20/B38/B40/B41)

notes.1877: NV_RF_BC_CONFIG_I — RF hardware band class caps. Asian UF02 has bit26 extra (WCDMA B9 Japan)
notes.1878: NV_RF_BC_CONFIG_DIV_I — diversity chain, same on all variants
notes.6828: NV_LTE_BAND_PREF_I — LTE band preference bitmask (LE): B1=bit0, B3=bit2, B5=bit4, B7=bit6, B8=bit7, B20=bit19, B38=bit37, B40=bit39, B41=bit40
